title: Invalid field names
body:
https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/d5687946f6a0aa14a5326f26ca0ceca68588056f/cmd/podman/varlink/io.podman.varlink#L33

Field names are NOT supposed to contain capital letters. See https://varlink.org/Interface-Definition
```
field_name  = [a-z](_?[a-z0-9])*
```

comments.body: ok, will change the spec to allow camelcase
